name: 初始化建表
func: const sqls=['CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS devices (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,device_id TEXT UNIQUE,device_name TEXT,location TEXT,online_status INTEGER DEFAULT 0,last_seen TEXT,created_at TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,online INTEGER DEFAULT 0,last_ip TEXT,mqtt_online INTEGER DEFAULT 0,battery REAL,notes TEXT)','CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS device_latest_status (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,device_id TEXT UNIQUE,capacity REAL,temperature REAL,humidity REAL,air_quality INTEGER,human_detect INTEGER,box_tilt_alert INTEGER,fan_status INTEGER,front_door INTEGER,back_door INTEGER,net_mode TEXT,updated_at TEXT)','CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS device_history (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,device_id TEXT,timestamp TEXT,capacity REAL,temperature REAL,humidity REAL,air_quality INTEGER,human_detect INTEGER,box_tilt_alert INTEGER,fan_status INTEGER,front_door INTEGER,back_door INTEGER,net_mode TEXT)','CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS device_alerts (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,device_id TEXT,alert_type TEXT,alert_msg TEXT,alert_level TEXT,is_ack INTEGER DEFAULT 0,created_at TEXT)','CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS device_commands (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,device_id TEXT,action TEXT,source TEXT,result TEXT,created_at TEXT,executed_at TEXT)','CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS admin_users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,username TEXT,password_hash TEXT,token TEXT,role TEXT,created_at TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)','CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telemetry (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,device_id TEXT NOT NULL,ts INTEGER NOT NULL,temperature REAL,humidity REAL,capacity REAL,air_quality REAL,human_detect INTEGER,fan_status INTEGER,front_door INTEGER,back_door INTEGER,tilt_angle REAL,sensor_faults TEXT,buzzer_mode TEXT,raw_json TEXT)','CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS alerts (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,device_id TEXT NOT NULL,ts INTEGER NOT NULL,alert_type TEXT NOT NULL,alert_msg TEXT NOT NULL,is_ack INTEGER DEFAULT 0)','CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS commands (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,device_id TEXT NOT NULL,ts INTEGER NOT NULL,action TEXT NOT NULL,status TEXT NOT NULL,source TEXT,raw_json TEXT)','INSERT OR IGNORE INTO devices (device_id,device_name,location,online_status,last_seen,online,mqtt_online) VALUES (\'ESP32_BOX_001\',\'???????\',\'???\',0,\'???\',0,0)','INSERT OR IGNORE INTO admin_users (username,password_hash,token,role) VALUES (\'admin\',\'demo_hash\',\'admin_auth_secret01\',\'admin\')']; sqls.forEach((sql,i)=>setTimeout(()=>node.send({topic:sql,payload:[]}),i*20)); return null;

name: 清理旧数据
func: const cutoff=Date.now()-30*86400000;return[{topic:'DELETE FROM telemetry WHERE ts < $p1',payload:[cutoff]},{topic:'DELETE FROM alerts WHERE ts < $p1',payload:[cutoff]},{topic:'DELETE FROM commands WHERE ts < $p1',payload:[cutoff]}];

name: 遥测处理
func:
const d = msg.payload || {};
const ts = Date.now();
const front = !!(d.frontLight || d.frontDoor || d.front_door);
const back = !!(d.backLight || d.backDoor || d.back_door);

const data = {
  deviceId: d.deviceId || d.device_id || 'ESP32_BOX_001',
  temperature: Number(d.temperature || d.temp || 0),
  humidity: Number(d.humidity || d.hum || 0),
  capacity: Number(d.capacity || d.fullness || 0),
  airQuality: Number(d.airQuality || d.air_quality || d.mq135 || 0),
  humanDetect: !!(d.humanDetect || d.human_detect || d.pir),
  fanStatus: !!(d.fanStatus || d.fan_status),
  frontLight: front,
  backLight: back,
  frontDoor: front,
  backDoor: back,
  tiltAngle: Number(d.tiltAngle || d.tilt_angle || 0),
  sensorFaults: Array.isArray(d.sensorFaults) ? d.sensorFaults : (Array.isArray(d.sensor_faults) ? d.sensor_faults : []),
  buzzerMode: d.buzzerMode || d.buzzer_mode || 'off',
  netMode: d.netMode || d.net_mode || 'STA',
  wifiSsid: d.wifiSsid || d.wifi_ssid || '',
  mqttServer: d.mqttServer || d.mqtt_server || '',
  mqttPort: Number(d.mqttPort || d.mqtt_port || 1883),
  staIp: d.staIp || d.sta_ip || '',
  systemState: d.systemState || 'STANDBY',
  lastSeen: ts,
  mqttOnline: true
};

global.set('latestTelemetry', data);
global.set('latestTelemetryRaw', d);

const status = [
  '设备: ' + data.deviceId,
  '在线: 是',
  '温度: ' + data.temperature.toFixed(1) + ' C',
  '湿度: ' + data.humidity.toFixed(1) + ' %',
  '满载率: ' + data.capacity.toFixed(1) + ' %',
  '空气质量: ' + data.airQuality,
  '倾角: ' + data.tiltAngle.toFixed(1) + ' deg',
  '风扇: ' + (data.fanStatus ? '开' : '关'),
  '前门: ' + (data.frontLight ? '开' : '关'),
  '后门: ' + (data.backLight ? '开' : '关'),
  '故障: ' + (data.sensorFaults.length ? data.sensorFaults.join(',') : '无')
].join('\n');

return [
  { payload: data.temperature, topic: 'temperature' },
  { payload: data.humidity, topic: 'humidity' },
  { payload: data.capacity, topic: 'capacity' },
  { payload: data.airQuality, topic: 'airQuality' },
  { payload: data.tiltAngle, topic: 'tiltAngle' },
  { payload: status },
  { topic: 'INSERT INTO telemetry (device_id,ts,temperature,humidity,capacity,air_quality,human_detect,fan_status,front_door,back_door,tilt_angle,sensor_faults,buzzer_mode,raw_json) VALUES ($p1,$p2,$p3,$p4,$p5,$p6,$p7,$p8,$p9,$p10,$p11,$p12,$p13,$p14)', payload: [data.deviceId, ts, data.temperature, data.humidity, data.capacity, data.airQuality, data.humanDetect ? 1 : 0, data.fanStatus ? 1 : 0, data.frontLight ? 1 : 0, data.backLight ? 1 : 0, data.tiltAngle, JSON.stringify(data.sensorFaults), data.buzzerMode, JSON.stringify(d)] },
  { topic: 'INSERT INTO devices (device_id,device_name,online,last_seen,mqtt_online) VALUES ($p1,$p2,$p3,$p4,$p5) ON CONFLICT(device_id) DO UPDATE SET device_name=excluded.device_name,online=excluded.online,last_seen=excluded.last_seen,mqtt_online=excluded.mqtt_online', payload: [data.deviceId, 'ESP32_BOX_001', 1, ts, 1] }
];

name: 告警处理
应答记录
刷新摘要
状态日志
func: node.warn((msg.status&&msg.status.text?msg.status.text:'status')+' @ '+(msg.status&&msg.status.source&&msg.status.source.name?msg.status.source.name:''));return msg;

name: 状态JSON
历史查询SQL
func: const q=msg.req&&msg.req.query?msg.req.query:{};const deviceId=q.deviceId||'ESP32_BOX_001';const limit=Math.max(1,Math.min(500,Number(q.limit||24)));msg.topic='SELECT * FROM telemetry WHERE device_id = $p1 ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT $p2';msg.payload=[deviceId,limit];msg._queryType='history';return msg;

name: 历史返回
func: const rows=Array.isArray(msg.payload)?msg.payload:[];rows.reverse();msg.statusCode=200;msg.payload={code:200,msg:'ok',data:{timeline:rows.map(r=>new Date(r.ts).toLocaleTimeString('zh-CN',{hour12:false})),tempData:rows.map(r=>Number(r.temperature||0)),humidityData:rows.map(r=>Number(r.humidity||0)),airData:rows.map(r=>Number(r.air_quality||0)),capacityData:rows.map(r=>Number(r.capacity||0)),tiltData:rows.map(r=>Number(r.tilt_angle||0))}};return msg;

name: 设备查询SQL
func: msg.topic='SELECT * FROM devices ORDER BY last_seen DESC';msg.payload=[];msg._queryType='devices';return msg;

name: 设备返回
func: const rows=Array.isArray(msg.payload)?msg.payload:[];const now=Date.now();msg.statusCode=200;msg.payload={code:200,msg:'ok',data:rows.map(r=>({deviceId:r.device_id,deviceName:r.device_name,online:Boolean(r.online)&&now-Number(r.last_seen||0)<15000,mqttOnline:Boolean(r.mqtt_online),lastSeen:r.last_seen?new Date(r.last_seen).toLocaleString('zh-CN',{hour12:false}):'未知',lastIp:r.last_ip||''}))};return msg;

name: 告警查询SQL
func: const q=msg.req&&msg.req.query?msg.req.query:{};const deviceId=q.deviceId||'ESP32_BOX_001';msg.topic='SELECT * FROM alerts WHERE device_id = $p1 ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 100';msg.payload=[deviceId];msg._queryType='alerts';return msg;

name: 告警返回
func: const rows=Array.isArray(msg.payload)?msg.payload:[];msg.statusCode=200;msg.payload={code:200,msg:'ok',data:rows.map(r=>({id:r.id,deviceId:r.device_id,alertType:r.alert_type,alertMsg:r.alert_msg,is_ack:Boolean(r.is_ack),time:new Date(r.ts).toLocaleString('zh-CN',{hour12:false})}))};return msg;

name: 指令查询SQL
func: msg.topic='SELECT * FROM commands ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 100';msg.payload=[];msg._queryType='commands';return msg;

name: 指令返回
func: const rows=Array.isArray(msg.payload)?msg.payload:[];msg.statusCode=200;msg.payload={code:200,msg:'ok',data:rows.map(r=>({id:r.id,deviceId:r.device_id,action:r.action,status:r.status,source:r.source,time:new Date(r.ts).toLocaleString('zh-CN',{hour12:false})}))};return msg;

name: 健康JSON
func: msg.statusCode=200;msg.payload={code:200,msg:'ok',data:{httpPort:1880,mqttPort:1883,mqttBrokerOnline:true,db:'iot_box.db'}};return msg;

name: 控制下发
配置下发
告警已读SQL
func: const body=msg.payload||{};const deviceId=body.deviceId||'ESP32_BOX_001';if(body.id){msg.topic='UPDATE alerts SET is_ack = 1 WHERE id = $p1';msg.payload=[body.id];}else{msg.topic='UPDATE alerts SET is_ack = 1 WHERE device_id = $p1';msg.payload=[deviceId];}msg.statusCode=200;msg.payload={code:200,msg:'ok',data:{updated:true}};return [msg,null];

name: 结果分发
func: if(msg._queryType==='history'){return [msg,null,null,null];}if(msg._queryType==='devices'){return [null,msg,null,null];}if(msg._queryType==='alerts'){return [null,null,msg,null];}if(msg._queryType==='commands'){return [null,null,null,msg];}return null;

name: 兼容历史参数
func: const q=msg.req&&msg.req.query?msg.req.query:{};msg.req.query={deviceId:q.device_id||q.deviceId||'ESP32_BOX_001',limit:q.limit||50};return msg;

name: 面板控制
